mapper.select:
SELECT ANL_SEQ, BIZ_TITLE, ENERGY_SRC, TO_CHAR(STAND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAND_DATE, TIC_ATR_ROI, TIC_NPV_VAL, TIC_BCR_DSC, TIC_PBP_YRS, EQT_ROE_FCF, EQT_ROE_DIV, EQT_NPV_VAL, EQT_BCR_DSC, EQT_PBP_YRS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID FROM BIZ_ECO_ANL WHERE 1 = 1
AND ENERGY_SRC = #{energySrc}
AND BIZ_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{bizTitle} || '%'
ORDER BY ANL_SEQ DESC

SELECT ANL_SEQ, BIZ_TITLE, ENERGY_SRC, TO_CHAR(STAND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAND_DATE, TIC_ATR_ROI, TIC_NPV_VAL, TIC_BCR_DSC, TIC_PBP_YRS, EQT_ROE_FCF, EQT_ROE_DIV, EQT_NPV_VAL, EQT_BCR_DSC, EQT_PBP_YRS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID FROM BIZ_ECO_ANL WHERE ANL_SEQ = #{anlSeq}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(ANL_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM BIZ_ECO_ANL
INSERT INTO BIZ_ECO_ANL ( ANL_SEQ, BIZ_TITLE, ENERGY_SRC, STAND_DATE, TIC_ATR_ROI, TIC_NPV_VAL, TIC_BCR_DSC, TIC_PBP_YRS, EQT_ROE_FCF, EQT_ROE_DIV, EQT_NPV_VAL, EQT_BCR_DSC, EQT_PBP_YRS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID ) VALUES ( #{anlSeq}, #{bizTitle}, #{energySrc},
TO_DATE(#{standDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , #{ticAtrRoi}, #{ticNpvVal}, #{ticBcrDsc}, #{ticPbpYrs}, #{eqtRoeFcf}, #{eqtRoeDiv}, #{eqtNpvVal}, #{eqtBcrDsc}, #{eqtPbpYrs}, #{attachFileSeq}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE BIZ_ECO_ANL SET BIZ_TITLE = #{bizTitle}, ENERGY_SRC = #{energySrc}, STAND_DATE =
TO_DATE(#{standDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , TIC_ATR_ROI = #{ticAtrRoi}, TIC_NPV_VAL = #{ticNpvVal}, TIC_BCR_DSC = #{ticBcrDsc}, TIC_PBP_YRS = #{ticPbpYrs}, EQT_ROE_FCF = #{eqtRoeFcf}, EQT_ROE_DIV = #{eqtRoeDiv}, EQT_NPV_VAL = #{eqtNpvVal}, EQT_BCR_DSC = #{eqtBcrDsc}, EQT_PBP_YRS = #{eqtPbpYrs}, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ = #{attachFileSeq}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPWRITER_ID = #{upwriterId} WHERE ANL_SEQ = #{anlSeq}
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(ANL_SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM BIZ_ECO_ANL_HISTORY
INSERT INTO BIZ_ECO_ANL_HISTORY ( ANL_SEQ, VERSION, BIZ_TITLE, ENERGY_SRC, STAND_DATE, TIC_ATR_ROI, TIC_NPV_VAL, TIC_BCR_DSC, TIC_PBP_YRS, EQT_ROE_FCF, EQT_ROE_DIV, EQT_NPV_VAL, EQT_BCR_DSC, EQT_PBP_YRS, REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID ) VALUES ( #{anlSeq}, 1, #{bizTitle}, #{energySrc},
TO_DATE(#{standDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , #{ticAtrRoi}, #{ticNpvVal}, #{ticBcrDsc}, #{ticPbpYrs}, #{eqtRoeFcf}, #{eqtRoeDiv}, #{eqtNpvVal}, #{eqtBcrDsc}, #{eqtPbpYrs}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId}, SYSDATE, #{inwriterId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ANL_SEQ, VERSION, BIZ_TITLE, ENERGY_SRC, TO_CHAR(STAND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAND_DATE, TIC_ATR_ROI, TIC_NPV_VAL, TIC_BCR_DSC, TIC_PBP_YRS, EQT_ROE_FCF, EQT_ROE_DIV, EQT_NPV_VAL, EQT_BCR_DSC, EQT_PBP_YRS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID FROM BIZ_ECO_ANL_HISTORY WHERE ANL_SEQ = #{anlSeq} ORDER BY VERSION DESC

SELECT ANL_SEQ, VERSION, BIZ_TITLE, ENERGY_SRC, TO_CHAR(STAND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAND_DATE, TIC_ATR_ROI, TIC_NPV_VAL, TIC_BCR_DSC, TIC_PBP_YRS, EQT_ROE_FCF, EQT_ROE_DIV, EQT_NPV_VAL, EQT_BCR_DSC, EQT_PBP_YRS, ATTACH_FILE_SEQ, TO_CHAR(REGI_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGI_DATE, INWRITER_ID, TO_CHAR(UPDATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS UPDATE_DATE, UPWRITER_ID FROM BIZ_ECO_ANL_HISTORY WHERE ANL_SEQ = #{anlSeq} AND VERSION = #{version}
